address: Dade County Courthouse, 73 West Flagler Street, Room 1801, Miami, FL 33130
programs: County court (landlord/tenant, small claims, county civil)
notes: Maintains formal Mediation and Arbitration "Wheels" for court-appointed mediators at $125/hour and arbitrators at $200/day. Hours 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Mon–Fri.
